criteria.check: Agent ran grep for CSS custom properties (--) in src/app.css or equivalent
Agent checked for tailwind.config.* file (not found is an acceptable result)
Agent read at least 2 component or page files before generating output
No {TOKEN_*} or {PROJECT_NAME} placeholders remain in the generated design-reference.md
All 4 colour tokens from @theme appear verbatim with their actual hex values — no invented colours
Dark mode section contains 'TBD — not yet defined' (no dark mode was present in codebase)
All 12 sections are present in design-reference.md even if some contain only TBD markers
Companion SKILL.md was generated under .agents/skills/ (not under docs/)
Companion SKILL.md frontmatter description names the specific project, not a generic tool description
Step 8 confirmation block was printed listing populated sections with token counts
Step 8 confirmation block explicitly lists TBD items (at minimum: dark mode)
Reference sheet names src/app.css (or equivalent) as the authoritative token file
Agent did not assume Tailwind breakpoints from memory — checked config or CSS
Component pattern in §9 uses actual className strings from the codebase, not invented JSX
Agent populated or referenced skill-output.yaml before generating markdown (or equivalent scratchpad step)
Agent validated or referenced schema validation before generating markdown
